Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}What could this be...? There seems to be some kind of... distortion in space somewhere on this floor?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}I'm sensing something ominous... Please be careful from here on.[n]{f 1 1}
